title: The Spy in the Market
description: Two sell outcomes and a debunked theory expose the true Green aspect of ingredient 1.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing5, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing3+ing4=R-: both share R-), ing5=R+ (ing5 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G- (ing1+ing3=G-: both share G-), ing5=G+ (ing5 has G+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B+ (ing3 has B+), ing5=B- (ing5+ing8=B-: both share B-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.

To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing3+ing4=R-: both share R-), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+; ing6+ing8=neutral → ing8 has R-; ing6+ing8=neutral → ing6 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G- (ing1+ing3=G-: both share G-), ing6=G+ (ing6+ing7=G+: both share G+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B+ (ing3 has B+), ing6=B+ (ing5+ing8=B-: both share B-; ing6+ing8=neutral → ing6 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R- (ing3+ing4=R-: both share R-), ing8=R- (ing8 has R-; ing6+ing8=neutral → ing6 has R+; ing6+ing8=neutral → ing8 has R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.
